name: Amicus
description:
While you sleep, a wolf from another planet kidnaps you to make you his pet.

21.02.2026 - HUGE bot rework! The bot definition has been slightly reworked, the initial message is completely new and much better than the previous one, and a fantastic lorebook by @Fortani has been added, which contains all the details about the world and characters of Adastra! In addition, the bot now supports AnyPOV.
